snippet.title: DIGGER | Official Trailer
snippet.description:
Digg. Or Die. DIGGER. Only in theaters October 2. #Diggermovie



Academy Award winner Tom Cruise stars in Academy Award-winning filmmaker Alejandro G. Iñárritu’s original film “Digger,” from Warner Bros. Pictures and Legendary Pictures.
The most powerful man in the world embarks on a frantic mission to prove he is humanity’s savior before the disaster he’s unleashed destroys everything.
Cruise stars in the title role, alongside Oscar winner Riz Ahmed, John Goodman, Oscar nominee Sandra Hüller, Michael Stuhlbarg, and Oscar nominee Jesse Plemons.  Robert John Burke, Emma D’Arcy, Burn Gorman and Sophie Wilde also star. 
Iñárritu directed from a screenplay by Iñárritu & Oscar-winners Alexander Dinelaris & Nicolás Giacobone, and Sabina Berman, story by Iñárritu & Berman.  The film is produced by Iñárritu, Oscar nominee Mary Parent, Cruise and Michael Sharp, and executive produced by Joshua Grode, Berman, Dinelaris, Giacobone, Jez Butterworth and Emmanuel Lubezki.
Joining Iñárritu behind the camera are previous collaborators Oscar-winning director of photography Emmanuel Lubezki; editors Conor O’Neill and Oscar winner Stephen Mirrone; Oscar-nominated costume designer Jacqueline West; Oscar-winning makeup and hair designer Alessandro Bertolazzi; and Oscar-nominated casting director Francine Maisler; along with Oscar-winning production designer Dennis Gassner and production designer Richard Johnson, Oscar-winning prosthetic makeup designer Kazu Hiro, and composer Cosmo Sheldrake.
An Alejandro G. Iñárritu Film, “Digger” was shot entirely in VistaVision and will be released in theaters and IMAX® across North America on October 2, 2026, and internationally beginning 30 September 2026.  It will be distributed by Warner Bros. Pictures.

snippet.title: Crystal Lake | Official Teaser | Peacock Original
snippet.description:
Crystal Lake is streaming October 15 on Peacock: https://pck.tv/45hBP6q

Synopsis: A prequel to the Friday the 13th franchise, the series follows single mother Pam Voorhees who has been unable to shake her grief after her young, sickly son Jason tragically drowned in the town lake almost a year before. When two strangers arrive at Pam’s door digging into her past, a disturbing chain of events are set into motion, leaving the townspeople of Crystal Lake wondering: just who is Pam Voorhees?

#Peacock #CrystalLake #OfficialTeaser

Peacock is your go-to for hit movies, TV, live sports, and more. With the streaming service from NBCUniversal, you can watch new movies from theaters, current hits from NBC and Bravo, nonstop action from WWE, Premier League, Big Ten, and tons of other sports. Covering House Of The Dragon Season 3 Episode 5 Trailer Breakdown & Easter Eggs. Episode 4 Ending Aftermath, Daeron Targaryen & Tessarion. Ormund Hightower vs Rhaenyra, Episode 7 Battle of Tumbleton footage, Alys Rivers and Aemond at Harrenhal with Vhagar, Criston Cole vs Alys Rivers. Rhaenyra vs Alicent Scenes. Rhaenyra Iron Throne. Ormund Hightower's plan to steal the Dragonseeds Hugh Hammer Vermithor. House Of The Dragon Season 3 Episode 6, Episode 7 and Episode 8 Finale Trailer footage. Aegon and Sunfyre at Rooks Rest. 

House Stark, Knight Of The Seven Kingdoms Connection to Dunk and Egg. The Isle of Faces, God's Eye, Green Men, Daemon & Rhaenyra Arc, Daeron Targaryen, Ormund Hightower, Cregan Stark, Roderick Dustin and the Stark Army Winter Wolves. Black Alys Alysanne Blackwood. Daemon & Rhaenyra. The Fall of King's Landing, Battle Of The Gullet, other major battles. Aemond at Harrenhal. Daemon vs Aemond, The Gods Eye, Helaena Dragon Dreams, Daemon Visions, Three Eyed Raven. The Fake Daeron Targaryen Explained.

Why Alys Rivers wants Aemond. House Of The Dragon Season 2 Episode 8 Finale Aftermath and Ending Explained. Daemon Sees Daenerys Targaryen, all of Daemon's Weirwood Visions. The Three Eyed Raven Brynden Rivers, The Bloodraven. Knight Of The Seven Kingdoms Trailer connection. House Of The Dragon Season 3 Teaser. Rhaenyra on the Iron Throne. Helaena Dragon Dreams upgrade.

New History and Lore, Vermithor, Silverwing, Dragonseeds, Hugh Hammer, Ulf White, Seasmoke Addam Hull, Sheepstealer, Daeron Tessarion. Alys Rivers. Why Daemon and Rhaenyra Take King's Landing, Fall of King's Landing. How they trick Aemond and Vhagar.

Riverlands Battle, House Stark Returns, Cregan Stark Easter Eggs. House Tully. House Of The Dragon Season 3 Episodes. Vermithor, Arrax Lucerys Dragon, Moondancer Baela, Rhaena Sheepstealer, Aegon II Sunfyre, Helaena Targaryen Dreamfyre. Helaena Targaryen Dragon Dreams and how she tells the future. Aegon The Conqueror and Valyria Explained. Daemon Targaryen and Vermithor Explained. Dance of The Dragons Trailer and A Song of Ice And Fire Book Easter Eggs. Jon Snow Daenerys Targaryen Family History and Lore.

More House of the Dragon Season 3 and Knight Of The Seven Kingdoms  Season 2 videos soon. And the Aegon's Conquest Movie!

I'm a thousand miles away

Plain White T's
"Hey There Delilah"

Hey there, Delilah
What's it like in New York City?
I'm a thousand miles away

I swear it's true

I've got so much left to say

Would take your breath away

We'd have it all

Oh it's what you do to me
Oh it's what you do to me
Oh it's what you do to me

But they've got planes and trains and cars
I'd walk to you if I had no other way

That none of them have felt this way
Delilah, I can promise you
That by the time we get through
The world will never ever be the same
And you're to blame

Hey there, Delilah

Two more years and you'll be done with school
And I'll be making history like I do
You'll know it's all because of you
We can do whatever we want to
Hey there, Delilah, here's to you
This one's for you

Oh it's what you do to me
Oh it's what you do to me

snippet.title: Lukas Graham - 7 Years (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
Lukas Graham - 7 Years (Lyrics)

Follow Lukas Graham:
https://www.instagram.com/lukasgraham
https://www.facebook.com/LukasGraham
https://www.tiktok.com/@lukasgraham

Lyrics:

[Chorus]
Once, I was seven years old, my mama told me
Go make yourself some friends, or you'll be lonely
Once, I was seven years old

[Verse 1]
It was a big, big world, but we thought we were bigger
Pushing each other to the limits, we were learning quicker
By eleven, smoking herb and drinking burning liquor
Never rich, so we were out to make that steady figure

[Chorus]
Once, I was eleven years old, my daddy told me
Go get yourself a wife, or you'll be lonely
Once, I was eleven years old

[Verse 2]
I always had that dream like my daddy before me
So I started writing songs, I started writing stories
Something about that glory just always seemed to bore me
'Cause only those I really love will ever really know me

[Chorus]
Once, I was twenty years old, my story got told
Before the morning sun, when life was lonely
Once, I was twenty years old (Lukas Graham!)

[Verse 3]
I only see my goals, I don't believe in failure
'Cause I know the smallest voices, they can make it major
I got my boys with me, at least those in favor
And if we don't meet before I leave, I hope I'll see you later

[Chorus]
Once, I was twenty years old, my story got told
I was writing 'bout everything I saw before me
Once, I was twenty years old

[Bridge]
Soon, we'll be thirty years old, our songs have been sold
We've traveled around the world and we're still roaming
Soon, we'll be thirty years old

[Verse 4]
I'm still learning about life, 
my woman brought children for me
So I can sing them all my songs, and I can tell them stories
Most of my boys are with me, some are still out seeking glory
And some I had to leave behind, 
my brother, I'm still sorry

[Chorus]
Soon, I'll be sixty years old, my daddy got sixty-one
Remember life and then your life becomes a better one
I made a man so happy when I wrote a letter once
I hope my children come and visit once or twice a month
[Breakdown]
Soon, I'll be sixty years old, will I think the world is cold?
Or will I have a lot of children who can warm me?
Soon, I'll be sixty years old
Soon, I'll be sixty years old, will I think the world is cold?
Or will I have a lot of children who can hold me?
Soon, I'll be sixty years old

[Chorus]
Once, I was seven years old, my mama told me
"Go make yourself some friends, or you'll be lonely"
Once I was seven years old
Once I was seven years old

snippet.title: SPIDER-MAN: BRAND NEW DAY (2026) TRAILER | Tom Holland | Marvel Comics | Concept
snippet.description:
#SpiderManBrandNewDay #SpiderMan #Brandnewday #Marvel #Comics

🎥 Attention viewers! (ITS FAN MADE)
This Spider-Man: Brand New Day breakdown dives into every detail from the final trailer and the latest Spider-Man 2026 trailer footage fans have been dissecting frame by frame. Tom Holland's Peter Parker faces his biggest test yet alongside Zendaya, with Sadie Sink stepping into the Marvel Studios universe in a role many are calling the true successor to the emotional weight of No Way Home. This video unpacks every scene from the new Spider-Man movie, exploring how Brand New Day connects to Peter's journey and what it means for his future in the MCU. Whether you're searching for 4K trailer breakdowns, the newest Spider-Man trailer drops, or just want the full comics-accurate analysis, this is your complete guide to Marvel's most anticipated release of 2026.

snippet.title: Mastodon - Snakes For Dinner (Official Video)
snippet.description:
You have all been asking for it, so we are excited to announce our new album, Marrow Deep, will be released August 28th, 2026 and we are kicking it off with a new video for our new song “Snakes For Dinner”, which features an appearance from our long time friend, Josh Homme.

It’s been quite the journey making this album, and we are very happy with how it came out, we can not wait for you to hear the whole thing! Until then, check out the new video, and pre-order a copy of the album today. Stay tuned, we’l keep bringing you updates, content and bunch of other cool fun stuff!

As always, thank you for being part of our world. We look forward to seeing you all on the Poisonous Weapons Tour and beyond!

Pre-order: https://i.mastodonrocks.com/shop
Pre-save: https://i.mastodonrocks.com/marrowdeep
Stream: http://i.mastodonrocks.com/snakesfordinner

Directed by DEATHCATS
Production Company: Another Video
Executive Producer: Doug Klinger
Producer: Hannah Alline
DP: Patrick Jones
Production Designer: SJ Prusakowski
HMU: Haley Dani
Wardrobe: Kay Stogner
SXF Makeup: Lisa Poe
Post Producer: Maria Paula Quesada
Edit, Color, and VFX: Supernova
Director’s Rep: LAB Inc

Lyrics:
Snakes For Dinner
What’s left to say
Thought I’ve seen it all
Broke our circle
Hitting us too hard
Innocence
Shattered light
Coming in
Hearts alive

When you left you took the moon and stars
Buried them deep underneath the ocean
When you left you took our hearts and minds
All that I could find amongst the grime were memories

Fault and reason
Make my head spin
Welcome failure
To become my friend

Where am I in the lense of your eyes

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community.  Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

snippet.title: MIRROR《同往》（Kizuna）Official Music Video
snippet.description:
獨自面對，還是我們一起面對的，都捱得過。
來，不要覺得被世界放棄。
我們相信，我們可以，你都一定可以。

#MIRROR #同往 #MIRRORweare 

－－－

《同往》

作曲：張繼聰
填詞：鄭敏
編曲：蘇道哲
監製：蘇道哲

曾經聲音失去過
曾經傷口都擦破
難關若衝得過 等於誰亦都可

無論做過瘋癲的壯舉
無論受過不安感佔據
無論住過憂鬱堡壘去寫出詩與句
無懼我跟你 一起追

多少等待和飄蕩
想追趕最遠星光
（如十二種方式 編了角色 在找終點的答案）

會有各自目標 想去衝 得我至懂
（當你也相同）
似個身體 各細胞 輸與送
（痛的 都會 一齊痛）

受挫 為過 犯錯 飽經抱恙
（試過都重傷）
練戲 練舞 練過 怎麼說唱
（想跟你 一起撐上）
是各自要遇上千億次 興奮和惆悵
只要 敢要 幻想

So I write you in our song  
Side by side we’re staying strong 
無分彼此身世 只想跟你 尚有力氣都耗光
前路要分岔的去闖 （多麼嚮往）
一樣凝望終點一撮光 
沿途即管回看 平行的跑道
有著我追趕

當丟失地圖迷路星海
（如十二顆星體都各散於暗黑中）
當分開四散 始終撲空
（星海裡幾經失重）
要見証十二星座繁星照遍太空
（亦可抵抗黑洞）
最闊星海 也跨越到
（最遠的星也觸摸到）

受挫 為過 犯錯 飽經抱恙
（要痛得漂亮）
任性 為了 活過 即使勉強
（肩碰上肩 互相撐上）
要是各自要遇上千億次 興奮和惆悵
千個 （億個）
方向 （幻想） Ohhh

So I write you in our song 
Side by side we’re staying strong 
獨有一種天賦與及異能是你別要驚慌
前路要分岔的去闖 （多麼嚮往）
只為凝聚終點一撮光 
沿途陰天晴朗 遲或早起步
也有我單擋

沿途高低同往

OP: Halolulu Limited / Mad Poet Studio
SP: Warner Chappell Music, Hong Kong Limited

鋼琴 Piano: 蘇道哲
電結他 Electric Guitar: Derrick Sepnio 
木結他 Acoustic Guitar: Raven Lee 李文浩
音樂編程 Music Programming: 蘇道哲 
合成貝斯 Synth Bass: 蘇道哲
和音 Backing Vocals: Bernard Chan 
錄音師 Recording Engineer: 蘇道哲 / Chris Tong 
錄音室 Recording Studio: Q2 studio 
Vocal Editing: 蘇道哲/ Marcus Ho
混音師 Mixing Engineer: Marcus Ho

Translator: RN

－－－

Follow MIRROR
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/mirror.weare/
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/MIRROR.WeAre/
